description: Plant Metabolic Pathways Wiki (PlantMetWiki) is an open online portal for querying linked specialized plant pathway information. PlantMetWiki is available in Semantic Web format as Resource Description Framework (RDF) and can be accessed via an easy-to-use SNORQL user interface. Pre-written SPARQL queries are available for users to execute or adapt to retrieve pathway information.

link.note: GitHub organisation with the repositories that build PlantMetWiki

name: PlantMetWiki
